description.from: Deals 52*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 26.2% of ATK M.DMG 7 times to nearby enemies within a circular area. Then deals 548*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 263.1% of ATK M.DMG to enemies in a frontal area and inflicts Down for 1.5sec.
description.to: Deals a total of ??? M.DMG over 7 attacks to nearby enemies in a circular range of self. Then, attacks frontal enemies in range, dealing ??? M.DMG and knocking them down for 3 sec.

description.from: Deals 255*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 145% of ATK M.DMG to all enemies and inflicts Stun for 0.5sec. Upon casting, enters [Arcane Crystal Awakening] for 10sec, increasing the ATK Spd of all allies by 15%. While active, releases a shockwave every 1.3sec, dealing 280*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 159% of ATK M.DMG to nearby enemies.
description.to: Unleashes the power of [Arcane Crystals] within to deal ??? M.DMG to all enemies and stun them for 2 sec. Upon casting, activates [Arcane Crystal Awakening] for 15 sec, which increases ATK Spd of all allies by 300 and releases a shockwave every 2 sec to enemies in range of self, dealing ??? M.DMG and stunning them for 1 sec.

description.from: Summons an Arcane Crystal to deal 518*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 221.3% of ATK M.DMG to enemies in a frontal straight-line area, then causes an explosion shortly afterward that deals 828*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 354% of ATK additional M.DMG. Enemies hit are inflicted with [Arcane Crystal Curse] for 5 sec, reducing their ATK Spd by 10%. When Kirze attacks enemies affected by [Arcane Crystal Curse], applies a stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy]. After 5 sec, [Arcane Crystal Curse] explodes, dealing 290*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 200% of ATK M.DMG, plus an additional 43% of ATK M.DMG per stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy], and resets all [Arcane Crystal Energy] stacks.
description.to: Summons [Arcane Crystals] and deals ??? M.DMG to frontal enemies in a straight line. Shortly afterward, causes an explosion that deals ??? additional M.DMG and inflicts [Arcane Crystal Curse] upon enemies for 5 sec, reducing their ATK Spd by 200. Attacking enemies under [Arcane Crystal Curse] inflicts a stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy]. [Arcane Crystal Curse] explodes after 5 sec, dealing M.DMG equal to ??? + ??? per stack of [Arcane Crystal] Energy.

description.from: Changes base Mana Recovery per sec to 150, increases Crit Chance by 150, and increases the duration of CCs that all allies inflict on Bosses by 20%.
description.to: Increases own ATK by ??? and Crit Chance by 200 , while increasing the duration of CCs that all allies inflict to Bosses by 30%.

dark.from: Each use increases DMG by 15%. This effect can stack up to 10 times.
dark.to: When there is 1 enemy, increases DMG by 100%.

light.from: [Arcane Crystal Awakening] Increases duration by 4 sec.

dark.from: [Arcane Crystal Awakening] While active, increases Kirze’s ATK Spd by 40%.
dark.to: Increases the caster's DMG to all Non-hero enemies by 20% while under [Arcane Crystall Awakening].

light.from: [Arcane Crystal Curse] While active, additionally reduces ATK Spd by 10%.
At the start of battle, increases damage dealt to non-hero enemies by 65% for 10 sec.
light.to: Increases DMG to Non-hero enemies by 25% for 20 sec at the beginning of each battle.

description.from: [Slash, Blade of Judgment!] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces Mana Cost by 1.
description.to: [Slash Blade of Judgment!] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces Mana Cost by 1.

description.from: [Disperse, Crystal Haze!] Increases ATK Spd by an additional {0} and increases DEF Penetration of all allies by 100.
description.to: [Disperse, Crystal Haze!] Increases ATK Spd by an additional {0} and increases DEF Penetration of all allies by 250 for the duration of Skill.

description.from: [Bloom, Crimson Flower!] Increases DMG by {0}%, and gains 1 additional stack when [Arcane Crystal Energy] is stacked.
description.to: [Bloom, Crimson Flower!] Decreases Cooldown by 30%, and gaining 1 stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy] has a {0}% chance to add 3 additional stacks.

description.from: [End to Evil Deeds!] Increases Crit Chance by 250 and additionally increases CC duration increase effect by {0}%.
description.to: [End to Evil Deeds!] Increases Crit Chance by an additional 250 and the effect of the duration of CC increases chances to {0}%.

dark.from: Increases Crit DMG by 30% and DEF Penetration by 150. This effect increases by 2 times after Kirze attacks the enemy 100 times.
dark.to: Increases Crit DMG by 40% and DEF Penetration by 150. This effect is boosted by 2 times once Kirze attacks the enemy 100 times.

description.from: Greatly increases the effect range of [Bloom, Crimson Flower!].Normal and Skill attacks have a 8% chance to deal additional M.DMG equal to {0}% of ATK. DMG is increased by 2 times against Bosses.
description.to: Amplifies the power of Arcane Crystals and greatly increases the effect range of [Bloom, Crimson Flower!]. Normal and Skill attacks have a 4% chance to deal additional M.DMG equal to {0}% of ATK. DMG is doubled against Bosses.
